title: BEM-866 fix Claude inputs
objective:
Run script:
"""
q = Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem865_claude_write_selftest.json')
p = Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_processed/bem865_claude_write_selftest.json')
r = Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_results/bem865_claude_write_selftest_result.json')
q.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
if p.exists():
    p.unlink()
if r.exists():
    r.unlink()
task = (
    'BEM-865 Claude write selftest. '
    'Read governance/tasks/pending/CLAUDE_WRITE_SELFTEST_BEM865.md. '
    'Write governance/audit/mailbox/from_claude/BEM865_CLAUDE_WRITE_SELFTEST_RESPONSE.md with exactly: Status: CLAUDE_WRITE_OK. '
    'No issue comments.'
)
data = {
    'workflow': 'claude.yml',
    'ref': 'main',
    'inputs': {
        'role': 'auditor',
        'provider': 'claude',
        'trace_id': 'bem865_claude_write_selftest',
        'cycle_id': 'bem865',
        'task_type': 'audit_write_selftest',
        'task': task
    }
}
q.write_text(json.dumps(data, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False) + '\n', encoding='utf-8')
marker = Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM866_CLAUDE_INPUTS_FIXED.md')
marker.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
marker.write_text('# BEM-866 Claude inputs fixed\nStatus: FIXED\nInputs: role, provider, trace_id, cycle_id, task_type, task\nRemoved invalid input: role_provider\n', encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(q))
changed_files.append(str(marker))
ops_applied.append('fixed claude.yml inputs in BEM865 queue')
"""
No issue comments.
